race.comment: PRANCING FOOL (12) has been much better in her last two and gets a great chance to finally put it all together this time from another favourable draw. Gets in well with the claim and rates a leading player. MYSTRIX (10) hasn't been far away in her last two, just going under by 0.7L last time in the slop at Bordertown when favourite. Drawn sticky but doesn't have to improve much to get the job done. SWEET KICK (6) showed little early speed last start then picked up the bit in the straight to finish third at Balaklava over this journey. Will spot them a start from the car park draw but watch for her late. CONTRARY (14) hasn't threatened in her first two starts but should find this easier and gets in quite light with the 2kg claim. Can improve sharply. TASSORO (4) best of the rest.
